Operation 'delete-/automation/v4/flows/{flowId}' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) explicit parameter requirement (workflow ID), (2) response details (204 No Content), (3) side effects (termination of active instances and scheduled executions), and (4) clarified irreversibility. Enhanced summary with 'Permanently' to emphasize the destructive nature. These additions help AI agents understand the operation's full impact and determine if it matches their intent.

data.current_description: Fully delete a workflow by ID. Deleted workflows cannot be restored via the API. If you need to restore an accidentally deleted flow, you'll need to contact support.
data.summary_suggestion: Permanently delete a workflow by ID
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a workflow and all associated data by its ID. This operation is irreversible - deleted workflows cannot be restored through the API and require contacting support for recovery. Requires the workflow ID as a path parameter. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. All active instances and scheduled executions of the deleted workflow will be terminated.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) explicit parameter requirement (workflow ID), (2) response details (204 No Content), (3) side effects (termination of active instances and scheduled executions), and (4) clarified irreversibility. Enhanced summary with 'Permanently' to emphasize the destructive nature. These additions help AI agents understand the operation's full impact and determine if it matches their intent.

message: Operation 'get-/automation/v4/flows/email-campaigns' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Retrieve workflow emails' is ambiguous - unclear if retrieving email templates or sent emails. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes the returned data and doesn't explain the 4 available parameters. Enhanced version clarifies the operation retrieves sent emails, specifies required inputs, describes expected output structure, and mentions parameter support for better AI agent usability.

data.current_description: Retrieve emails sent by a workflow by ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve emails sent by a workflow
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all emails sent by a specific workflow. Requires the workflow ID as a parameter. Returns a list of email campaign records including delivery status, recipient information, and timestamps. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Retrieve workflow emails' is ambiguous - unclear if retrieving email templates or sent emails. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes the returned data and doesn't explain the 4 available parameters. Enhanced version clarifies the operation retrieves sent emails, specifies required inputs, describes expected output structure, and mentions parameter support for better AI agent usability.

message: Operation 'get-/automation/v4/flows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_input_details. Summary is concise and clear. Description is too minimal - doesn't explain what data is returned in the workflow objects or how the 2 available parameters can be used. Enhanced description clarifies the paginated response structure and parameter usage for better AI agent understanding of filtering and pagination capabilities.

data.current_description: Retrieve all workflows from an account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all workflows from an account. Returns a paginated list of workflow objects including their IDs, names, statuses, and metadata. Supports filtering and pagination through 2 query parameters to limit results and navigate through large workflow collections.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and clear. Description is too minimal - doesn't explain what data is returned in the workflow objects or how the 2 available parameters can be used. Enhanced description clarifies the paginated response structure and parameter usage for better AI agent understanding of filtering and pagination capabilities.

message: Operation 'post-/automation/v4/flows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is overly minimal and lacks critical details about what inputs are required, what the response contains, and the workflow lifecycle state after creation. Enhanced description explains the request structure, response content, and important side effect (draft state) for AI agents to understand the complete operation flow.

data.description_suggestion: Create a new workflow in the account. Accepts a workflow definition including name, trigger conditions, and action steps via the request body. Returns the created workflow object with an assigned workflow ID, status, and metadata. The workflow is created in a draft state and must be published before it can execute.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is overly minimal and lacks critical details about what inputs are required, what the response contains, and the workflow lifecycle state after creation. Enhanced description explains the request structure, response content, and important side effect (draft state) for AI agents to understand the complete operation flow.

message: Operation 'put-/automation/v4/flows/{flowId}' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is extremely minimal. Missing details about what can be modified in the request, what the response contains, and critical side effects regarding published workflow behavior. Enhanced description explains the modifiable fields, response structure, partial update support, and important side effect about republishing requirements for AI agents to use this operation correctly.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing workflow by ID. Accepts workflow modifications via the request body including name, trigger conditions, and action steps. Returns the updated workflow object with all current properties. Note: Updates to published workflows may require republishing to take effect. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is extremely minimal.
